svg.text: Isoform architecture: E2F1 {ECO:0000303|PubMed:8964493, ECO:0000312|HGNC:HGNC:3113} panel 'e2f1_uniprot_q01094' on grch38_e2f1
genomic span 1259..10788 | isoforms=1 | protein max=437 aa
display orientation: transcript 5'->3' left-to-right (dominant strand -) | top-panel geometry: cds
MUTAGEN: K->R: Abolishes acetylation; when associated with R-120 and R-125.
MUTAGEN: K->R: Abolishes acetylation; when associated with R-117 and R-125.
MUTAGEN: K->R: Abolishes acetylation; when associated with R-117 and R-120.
MUTAGEN: L->E: Abolishes interaction with and repression of CEBPA and inhibition of adipogenesis.
MUTAGEN: K->R: Abrogates methylation by SETD7. Loss of interaction with L3MBTL3. Loss of ubiquitination by the CRL4-DCAF5 E3 ubiquitin ligase complex.
REGION: Required for interaction with TRIM28
MUTAGEN: S->A: Abrogates in vitro phosphorylation by CHEK2 and CHEK2-dependent stabilization of E2F1 upon DNA damage.
MUTAGEN: S->A: Decreased phosphorylation by GSK3B, leading to abolished interaction with USP11 and subsequent deubiquitination.
MUTAGEN: Y->C: No retinoblastoma protein binding. No effect on interaction with and repression of CEBPA.
MUTAGEN: T->A: Decreased phosphorylation by GSK3B.
Isoform architecture view: top panel shows transcript/exon or transcript/CDS structure on genomic coordinates with 5'->3' orientation
left-to-right (strand-aware axis), bottom panel shows per-isoform protein-domain architecture on amino-acid coordinates. Row order is shared
across both panels; CDS-to-protein guide lines indicate which coding segments contribute to which amino-acid spans.
